since_last: 24% of 85 AI names green; Data Center, Power & Energy leads +0.12%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 24% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.57% · BTC -0.89% · Gold +0.59% · Nasdaq100 -1.89%. 24% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. Data Center, Power & Energy is doing the heavy lifting at +0.12%.

cards.headline: Data Center, Power & Energy leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Data Center, Power & Energy at +0.12%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.87%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MGNI is the standout at +9.91%
cards.body: Leaders: MGNI +9.91%, INOD +7.97%, TLN +6.95%, SPCX +4.25%, DLR +2.88%. Laggards: MRVL -9.09%, SNAP -8.57%, INTC -8.56%, AMD -7.61%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +4.25% at $200.68
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +4.25% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
